name: Corpse Explosion Rotation
note: Generative JOIN proof (T5-shape rotation icon): always visible, desaturates while on cooldown. Two triggers (cooldown state + usable state) OR'd via combine:any so the footprint persists; a join desaturates when the cooldown trigger shows. Corpse Explosion 533236, NECROMANCER. Parts + join structure byte-real from the Target set; the assembler composes them generatively (roles->indices, condition wiring).
